case_title: KRISSIA VANESSA GONZALEZ VS. MORNINGSTAR BUSINESS GROUP LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, KRISSIA VANESSA AS TO DEFENDANT MORNINGSTAR BUSINESS GROUP LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, KRISSIA VANESSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORNINGSTAR BUSINESS GROUP LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $2,377.03 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,602.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
